context: Tests whether the agent implements Klaviyo segment sync with correct batching, API versioning, profile field mapping, and authentication format; applies SHA-256 email hashing for Meta; creates suppression lists; validates segment sizes; and documents Klaviyo deduplication handling.

checklist.name: Klaviyo batch size 100
checklist.description: syncSegmentToKlaviyo splits customers into chunks/batches of 100 per request (NOT larger batches like 1000 or unbounded)

checklist.name: API revision header
checklist.description: The Klaviyo API request includes a 'revision' header with value '2024-02-15'

checklist.name: Klaviyo-API-Key auth format
checklist.description: The Authorization header uses the format 'Klaviyo-API-Key <key>' (NOT 'Bearer', NOT 'Token')

checklist.name: Profile fields: four attributes
checklist.description: The Klaviyo profile payload includes all four attributes: email, first_name, last_name, and phone_number (all must be present)

checklist.name: SHA-256 email hashing
checklist.description: exportSuppressionListForMeta applies SHA-256 hashing to email addresses before returning them

checklist.name: Email normalization before hash
checklist.description: The email is normalized (lowercased AND trimmed) before hashing, not hashed as-is

checklist.name: Suppression list created
checklist.description: There is a separate suppression list export (recent purchasers excluded from acquisition campaigns) distinct from the targeting list sync

checklist.name: Segment size validation
checklist.description: klaviyo_sync.ts includes a guard or check for when a segment has 0 customers, preventing an empty/no-op sync from proceeding silently

checklist.name: Klaviyo profiles endpoint
checklist.description: The Klaviyo API call targets the relationships/profiles sub-resource of the lists API (endpoint contains 'relationships/profiles')

checklist.name: Email as dedup primary key
checklist.description: klaviyo_runbook.md states that email should be used as the primary key for profile matching/deduplication in Klaviyo

checklist.name: Profile merge API mentioned
checklist.description: klaviyo_runbook.md mentions Klaviyo's profile merge API as the remedy for existing duplicate profiles

checklist.name: KLAVIYO_PRIVATE_KEY env var
checklist.description: The API key is read from process.env.KLAVIYO_PRIVATE_KEY (not hardcoded, not a different env var name)
